preflight.git_status: main...origin/main with pre-existing modified Phase 5 evidence PNGs and prior untracked Phase 1/2 screenshots/traces
preflight.docker_services: Pass after backend container rebuild/recreate; backend, frontend, platform Postgres, source Postgres, Redis, MySQL, and MSSQL running
setup_repairs: Rebuilt/recreated backend container after local restart exposed a missing uvicorn/runtime dependency path in the stale container.
Repaired local source_analytics setup by pointing the platform connection row at postgres-source:5432 for Docker-network access.
Refreshed source_analytics schema and restored Admin role_connection_policy from 172 schema entries / 30 tables.

full_backend_pytest.command: cd backend && rtk uv run pytest tests/ -x --tb=short
full_backend_pytest.result: 2478 passed, 4 skipped, 16 warnings, 35 subtests passed in 684.32s

frontend_gates.build: Pass - Vite large chunk warnings only

audit.pagination_note: Live API pagination passed; narrowed hostile-input UI filter did not render next/previous controls.

api_security_checks.quota_admin: Pass - list/status/update high/update low/restore all returned expected statuses
api_security_checks.quota_exceeded: Pass - 429 error.quota_exceeded with reset_at only; no generated_sql or attempt_id
api_security_checks.hostile_blocked: Pass - 400 error.hostile_input_blocked with message_key only; query quota used count unchanged
api_security_checks.detection_config: Pass - GET 200, invalid threshold 422 error.validation.generic, valid update 200, restored original thresholds
api_security_checks.audit_search: Pass - filters and page 1/page 2 pagination returned 200; hostile filter returned sanitized entries/no leaks
api_security_checks.audit_export: Pass - CSV and JSON downloads returned 200 with filenames and no sensitive metadata leaks
api_security_checks.audit_retention: Pass - retention_months, last_purge_at/never, purged_count fields returned
api_security_checks.sanitization: Pass - sampled API/UI responses and export metadata contained no raw hostile payload, rule names, patterns, stack traces, DB host, token, provider payload, password, or secret

real_llm_smoke.benign_under_quota: Pass - POST /query/submit returned 200 kind=result with generated_sql and numeric row_count
real_llm_smoke.hostile_before_quota_llm: Pass - hostile prompt returned 400 before quota increment and no generated_sql
real_llm_smoke.over_quota_before_llm: Pass - benign over quota returned 429 with no generated_sql and no attempt_id

setup_gaps: Local Docker backend had to be rebuilt/recreated after stale container restart failed with missing uvicorn.
A failed in-container uv run attempt damaged that container venv; recreating the backend from the rebuilt image restored dependencies.
Local .env source DB host values are host-oriented, while the Docker backend needs Docker-network hostnames; source_analytics row was repaired in the platform DB for this run.
